description_long: This object is a heavily armored combat tactical vehicle resembling a modern main battle tank. It features a large, rotating turret with a long-barreled cannon mounted centrally, and the turret appears to be camouflaged with a dark, irregular pattern. The hull is rectangular with pronounced, thick armor plating and a distinctive striped black-and-white paint scheme on the upper surfaces. The vehicle moves on wide, robust tracks with multiple road wheels visible along the sides, providing stability and traction. The front and rear are reinforced, with the front showing a sloped glacis plate and the rear housing exhaust or engine grilles. No visible hatches, markings, or secondary armaments are present, and the vehicle's design emphasizes protection and firepower.
description: A heavily armored tank with a camouflaged turret, long cannon, and striped black-and-white hull, riding on wide tracks.
description_view_0: Front view shows the sloped glacis plate, central cannon, and the striped upper hull.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the full length of the cannon, the camouflaged turret, and the row of road wheels beneath the striped hull.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back armor, engine grilles, and the continuation of the striped pattern.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the cannon, turret, and track system with visible wheels.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One large cannon mounted centrally on the turret; no other weapon mounts visible.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body armor plating with pronounced thickness, especially on the front glacis and turret; armor appears sloped and robust.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Turret features a dark green and brown irregular camouflage pattern; hull has a bold black-and-white striped paint scheme.
